steps.title: Match to a choice
steps.content:
The factors are constants times $(x+12)$ and $(2x+12)$.
  • A) $-12x+144 = -12(x-12)$ — not a factor.
  • B) $2x+12$ — appears directly in the factorization.
  • C) $6x+6 = 6(x+1)$ — not a factor.
  • D) $24x-144 = 24(x-6)$ — not a factor.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
